zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Browne於大約1489年出生在英國素瑞貝華斯時，她的父親Sir Anthony Browne47歲，母親Eleanor Ughtred20歲。她於1508年與Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1511年享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Browne于大约1489年出生在英国素瑞貝華斯时，她的父亲Sir Anthony Browne47岁，母亲Eleanor Ughtred20岁。她于1508年与Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1511年享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Browne was born about 1489, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, her father, Sir Anthony Browne, was 47 and her mother, Eleanor Ughtred, was 20. She married Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk in 1508. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1511, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Browne est née environ 1489, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Anthony Browne, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Ughtred, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk en 1508. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1511, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Browne um 1489 in Betchworth, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Anthony Browne 47 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Ughtred 20. Sie hat 1508 Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1511 im Alter von 24 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Browne è nata il circa 1489 nel Betchworth, Surrey, England, sua padre, Sir Anthony Browne, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Ughtred, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk nel 1508. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1511, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Browneが約1489年にイギリススリーベトチウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Anthony Browneは47歳，母Eleanor Ughtredは20歳であった。1508年にCharles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1511年に24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Browne(이)가 대략 1489년 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Anthony Browne(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Ughtred(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1508년 Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1511년 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Browne nasceu aproximadamente 1489, em Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Anthony Browne, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Ughtred, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk em 1508. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1511, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Browne родилась около 1489 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Anthony Browne было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Ughtred, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk в 1508 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1511 г. в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Browne nació aproximadamente 1489, en Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Anthony Browne, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Eleanor Ughtred, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk en 1508. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1511, a la edad de 24 años.
